name: Route 1 Mae Ka - Pratu Chai / Phayao city approach
capture_notes: Highest current seed AADT point is Route 1 Mae Ka - Pratu Chai at 37,625 AADT. Best first-pass corridor for roadside DC charging between Lampang/Chiang Rai and Phayao city.

name: Kwan Phayao / Phayao city core
capture_notes: Lakefront, government, hotel, food, tourism, and local city demand. Better for destination charging than high-turnover highway charging.

name: University of Phayao / Mae Ka education cluster
capture_notes: University and residential demand near Route 1. Useful for repeat local traffic and student/staff destination charging; EV ownership must be verified.

name: Route 1021 Dok Khamtai - Chiang Kham axis
capture_notes: Route 1021 has 9,340 and 8,864 AADT points in seed data. Important east-side district corridor but weaker urban density.

name: Route 1 south gateway / Mae Chai - Phayao
capture_notes: Route 1 northern/southern gateway traffic around Phayao. Good for travel stopover if site has strong roadside amenities.

name: Chiang Kham / Phu Sang tourism and border-side districts
capture_notes: District and tourism demand toward Phu Sang and northern/eastern Phayao. Likely seasonal and lower throughput.

name: Route 120 Phayao - Wang Nuea scenic connector
capture_notes: Scenic west-side connector with low AADT in current seed data. Consider only when paired with tourism destination or grant/coverage objective.
